channel.title: Levi Fackler | Hacker-Chic Resume
channel.description: Recent content on Levi Fackler | Hacker-Chic Resume

item.title: Family First Credit Union
item.description:
IT Specialist

Sep_2024 … Jun_2025

As the IT Specialist my primary duties revolved around desktop support.

  • Installed and Imaged 30 new PCs to facilitate an upgrade from Windows 10 to Windows 11.
  • Administered Portico (Core Banking) product for all staff.
  • Onboarded and Offboarded users for AD and all software systems.

What happens if I write text outside the lines?

item.title: Project: Nebula Optimizer
item.description: Nebula is my passion project. I built it to explore the limits of memory safety and concurrency in Rust. It’s now used by several open-source data pipelines.

item.title: Senior Software Engineer @ Google
item.description: At Google, I worked on scaling the unscalable. My focus was on optimizing low-latency services and ensuring high availability across global regions.

item.title: Full-Stack Web Development Bootcamp
item.description: Built several projects including a task manager and a social media clone.

item.title: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
item.description: I took some very difficult classes here.
